Claim for Discrepancy in Cash/Coin Parcel Received
2117
Further to the Currency Ordering update on October 5, 2023, we have now updated Form 2117 to reflect that cash parcels must be verified within 24 hours of receipt and any discrepancy claims must only be sent to RBC via armoured car.
